caption: Node
description: Represents a node or vertex in a graph structure. For normalized, cross-domain filtering (identity, topology, lineage), prefer entity_type_id and entity_type; use type only for legacy or source-specific labels that do not map to the entity type enum.
name: node

data.description: Additional data about the node stored as key-value pairs. Can include custom properties specific to the node.

desc.description: A human-readable description of the node's purpose or meaning in the graph.

entity_type.description: The entity type of this node, normalized to the caption of the entity_type_id value.

entity_type_id.description: The normalized identifier of the entity type represented by this node.

name.description: A human-readable name or label for the node. Should be descriptive and unique within the graph context.

type.description: Source-specific or legacy category string. Prefer entity_type_id for normalized node classification in graph projections.

uid.description: A unique string or numeric identifier that distinguishes this node from all others in the graph. Must be unique across all nodes.
